title: AI Portfolio Website
description: An interactive portfolio website powered by AI, allowing visitors to learn about my background, experience, projects, and skills through a conversational interface.
purpose: To showcase my profile in a unique and engaging way using AI.
learning: Learned how to integrate AI into web applications and organize personal information into an intelligent conversational system.

title: HiveFund – AI Powered Crowdfunding Platform
description: A full-stack crowdfunding platform with AI-assisted trust scoring to help identify suspicious campaigns and improve transparency.
problem: Crowdfunding platforms often struggle to identify fraudulent or low-trust campaigns.
solution: Built an AI-assisted trust scoring system using weighted algorithms to help administrators and donors evaluate campaign credibility.
learning: Strengthened my backend development skills while integrating AI concepts, authentication, payment gateways, and database design.

title: CloudCart – Cloud Native E-Commerce Backend
description: A scalable backend for an e-commerce platform featuring authentication, product management, inventory, and order processing.
purpose: To gain hands-on experience with cloud-native backend development and modern DevOps practices.
features: Product, inventory, and order management APIs
learning: Learned backend architecture, cloud deployment, Infrastructure as Code, caching strategies, CI/CD, and production-oriented API development.

title: RealtimeHub – Real-Time Messaging Platform
description: A real-time messaging backend supporting one-to-one and group conversations using WebSockets.
purpose: To understand real-time communication, backend architecture, monitoring, and scalable messaging systems.
features: REST APIs for authentication and chat management
Application monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana
learning: Learned real-time application development, WebSocket communication, caching, monitoring, containerization, and deployment of backend services.

title: InfraPilot
description: A platform engineering project focused on simplifying application deployment, infrastructure management, monitoring, and DevOps workflows.
purpose: To build a developer platform that makes cloud deployment and infrastructure management easier for startups and engineering teams.
learning: Exploring platform engineering, cloud infrastructure, deployment automation, observability, and scalable backend system design.
